Join Monday Night Call

A conversation that moves something.

Sometimes the knot loosens with the right question. This is energy work, in the form of a talk.

Book a session Start with the Monday call

What it's for

Sometimes the knot loosens with the right question.

This is energy work, in the form of a talk. No agenda, no protocol — just the kind of conversation that moves something in you.

  • ✦ Relationship issues
  • ✦ Self-image and confidence
  • ✦ Mental and emotional clarity
  • ✦ Getting over traumas
  • ✦ A different approach to mental illness
  • ✦ Relationship with food and body image
  • ✦ Crisis situations

Students say

"
"Likhitha's questions don't bind me with the set answers, they set me free to find the answers for myself. She has put her awareness and sincere efforts to make me independent and feel safe in my own skin."
— Pragathi, Teacher
"
"Likhitha has got a different way of looking at life which is very refreshing and sensible. A few conversations with her made my understanding of concepts like money, vocation and progress clearer."
— Nagavamsi

Do you dare to be totally aware?

The conversation starts when you say so.

Book a session Join the free Monday call

Free · Every Monday

Free Monday Night Catch-Up

A weekly ritual that gently guides you back to awareness. Free, by design — you 'pay' by becoming a more present human.

Save your seat

Yoga, hands-on energy work, and consciousness practices — guided by Likhitha Sree.

True empowerment as key
